    Let's Talk Coffee

    Ready to source premium Kenyan green coffee for your roastery? Our trade team is here to help with samples, pricing, and logistics.

    Physical Address

    Nairobi, Kenya

    Pension Towers, 4th Flr. Loita Str

    Email

    trading@jowamcoffee.com

    operation@jowamcoffee.com

    Phone

    +254 (0) 722 762 945

    +254 (0) 728 919 092

    Business Hours

    Monday - Friday: 8 AM - 6 PM

    Saturday & Sunday: CLOSED

    Send us a Message

    Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24-48 hours.

    EmailJS Configuration Required

    To enable form submissions, configure EmailJS with your service credentials. Forms will work once configured, otherwise contact information will be displayed.

    💡 Response Time: We typically respond within 24-48 hours during business days.

    How We Can Help

    Our experienced trade team is ready to assist with all aspects of your Kenyan coffee sourcing needs.

    Sample Requests

    Request samples of specific grades, origins, or processing methods. We'll prepare 100-250g samples shipped directly to your roastery.

    Export Consultations

    Discuss volume requirements, shipping schedules, documentation, and logistics for your green coffee imports.

    Partnership Opportunities

    Explore long-term partnerships, private lot sourcing, and custom processing arrangements.

    Our Location

    Need Immediate Assistance?

    For urgent inquiries or immediate sample requests, contact us directly.

    Find answers to common questions about our Kenyan coffee exports, sourcing, and services.
